_note: Defines when the bot should escalate to a human operator.

rules.message: A team member will follow up shortly.
I am having trouble understanding. Would you like to speak with a person?
For larger orders, a team member will assist you personally.
This product is not available for automated checkout. A specialist will help you.
This product requires manual processing. Connecting you with our team.
We are updating this product's pricing. An advisor will assist you.
There was a connection issue. A team member will contact you shortly.
